data.body: Investigate recent step-failure handling for maestro-2325, verify whether a follow-up prompt was sent after the failure, and remove any remaining hardcoded or fallback agent name that surfaces as 'Codex' instead of the fully qualified actual agent identity. Implement a durable fix and validate with logs and tests. Do not move to a terminal state without explicit user instruction.
data.title: Fix agent identity and follow-up prompt handling
